zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Peter De Eyton於1320年出生在英國史洛普爾艾頓 亞爾 維姆時，他的父親Peter De Eyton IV47歲，母親Isabella Curzon40歲。他於大約1357年與Baroness Margery de Pedwardine結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他於1376年住在英國英格蘭史洛普爾艾頓 亞爾 維姆且於1376年住在英國史洛普爾艾頓 亞爾 史福斯波利。他去世於1377年在英國史洛普爾艾頓 白 比曉普斯 卡素享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Peter De Eyton于1320年出生在英国史洛普爾艾頓 亞爾 維姆时，他的父亲Peter De Eyton IV47岁，母亲Isabella Curzon40岁。他于大约1357年与Baroness Margery de Pedwardine结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他于1376年住在英国英格兰史洛普爾艾頓 亞爾 維姆且于1376年住在英国史洛普爾艾頓 亞爾 史福斯波利。他去世于1377年在英国史洛普爾艾頓 白 比曉普斯 卡素享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Eyton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Eyton (Shrops) or Eaton (Cheshire, Leics, Staffs), or Eaton Bray (Beds), Cold Eaton or Long Eaton (Derbys).

variants.name: Ayton
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Ayton (North Yorkshire) or Ayton (Berwickshire). The former is derived from Old Norse á ‘river, stream’ + tūn ‘farmstead’. The later takes its name from the River Eye (likely from Old English ēa ‘river, stream’) + tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Peter De Eyton was born in 1320, in Eyton near Wem, Shropshire, England, his father, Peter De Eyton IV, was 47 and his mother, Isabella Curzon, was 40. He married Baroness Margery de Pedwardine about 1357. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He lived in Eyton near Wem, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom in 1376 and Eyton near Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England in 1376. He died in 1377, in Eyton by Bishops Castle, Shropshire, England, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Peter De Eyton est né en 1320, à Eyton near Wem, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Peter De Eyton IV, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Isabella Curzon, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Baroness Margery de Pedwardine environ 1357. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il a vécu à Eyton near Wem, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1376 et à Eyton near Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre en 1376. Il est décédé en 1377, à Eyton by Bishops Castle, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Peter De Eyton 1320 in Eyton near Wem, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Peter De Eyton IV 47 und seine Mutter Isabella Curzon 40. Er hat um 1357 Baroness Margery de Pedwardine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. 1376 hat er in Eyton near Wem, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom und 1376 in Eyton near Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England gelebt. Er starb 1377 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Eyton by Bishops Castle, Shropshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Peter De Eyton è nato il nel 1320 nel Eyton near Wem, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, Peter De Eyton IV, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Isabella Curzon, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Baroness Margery de Pedwardine circa 1357. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Vissuto a Eyton near Wem, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1376 e nel Eyton near Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England nel 1376. Morì nel 1377, nel Eyton by Bishops Castle, Shropshire, England, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Peter De Eytonが1320年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアエイトン ネアル ウエムで生まれた時，父Peter De Eyton IVは47歳，母Isabella Curzonは40歳であった。約1357年にBaroness Margery de Pedwardineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1376年にはイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアエイトン ネアル ウエムに，1376年にはイギリスシュロプシュアイアエイトン ネアル シュリュースブリーに住んでいた。彼は1377年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアエイトン ビー ビショプス カストルで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Peter De Eyton(이)가 1320년 영국 슈럽실르 이턴 니아어 w에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Peter De Eyton IV(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella Curzon(은)는 40세였다. 그는 대략 1357년 Baroness Margery de Pedwardine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1376년도에 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 이턴 니아어 w에서, 1376년도에 영국 슈럽실르 이턴 니아어 슈레w스버이에서 살았다. 그는 1377년 영국 슈럽실르 이턴 비 비숍스 카스틀에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Peter De Eyton nasceu em 1320, em Eyton near Wem, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Peter De Eyton IV, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Curzon, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Baroness Margery de Pedwardine aproximadamente 1357. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele viveu em Eyton near Wem, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1376 e em Eyton near Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra em 1376. Ele faleceu em 1377, em Eyton by Bishops Castle, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Peter De Eyton родился в 1320 г. в местности эитон нир вем, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Peter De Eyton IV было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella Curzon, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Baroness Margery de Pedwardine около 1357 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он жил в местности эитон нир вем, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в 1376 году и в местности эитон нир шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия в 1376 году. Он умер в 1377 г. в местности эитон би бишопс кастл, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 57 лет.

es.Eyton on the Weald Moors, Shropshire, En: Eyton on the Weald Moors, Shropshire, Inglaterra
es.Eyton by Bishops Castle, Shropshire, Eng: Eyton by Bishops Castle, Shropshire, Inglaterra
es.Eyton upon the Weald Moors, Shropshire,: Eyton upon the Weald Moors, Shropshire, Inglaterra
es.Eyton, Shropshire, England: Eyton near Wem, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Peter De Eyton nació en 1320, en Eyton near Wem, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Peter De Eyton IV, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Isabella Curzon, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Baroness Margery de Pedwardine aproximadamente 1357. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Vivió en Eyton near Wem, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1376 y en Eyton near Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra en 1376. Murió en 1377, en Eyton by Bishops Castle, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años.
